start.speaker: Torvin
start.text: The dwarven gate does not open for strangers, but for a proven ally I can lend shield-work, stone sense, and a road through the dark halls.

choices.text: Walk with me into the caves.
We already stand the same watch.

joined.speaker: Torvin
joined.text: Then keep close. My shield takes the first ruin-stroke, and yours must answer the second.

already_joined.speaker: Torvin
already_joined.text: The halls know our steps now. We press on together.

end.speaker: Torvin
end.text: The mountain keeps its patience longer than any king.
